manifest.name: Vault Size History

name: Vault Size History

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description:
This is a release that contains a set of incremental fixes and updates:

#10 - Configurable file index refresh interval. The feature enables a setting to configure how often the plugin should check file changes.
#11 - CSV file malformation due to incorrect quotation mark that would prevent it from being correctly opened in external editors.
#12 - Color picker theme not matching current active Obsidian theme.
releases.name: Fixes for index file and color picker.

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description:
Addressing a feature request #9 - Color Selections.

The plugin now allows to choose custom colors for the categories in settings section.

If you observe identical colors of your graph lines upon upgrading, please open settings and adjust the colors as needed.
releases.name: Support custom category colors via color picker

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description:
Fixed an issue where the graph would render through the date of the most recent file even if that date is in the past.

The fix enables graph to render till present day even if the last created file is older.
releases.name: Minor fix for graph range.

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description: Tracking of deleted files (#6). Allows graph to go down on the days when the files got deleted.
releases.name: Track deleted files.

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description:
Implemented automatic file index to support the following use cases:

Use case 1:
Your Vault is being synchronized between devices and file creation dates are reset during the sync. You would like to build graph based on the original file creation dates.
Solution: the plugin will note the original file creation date in an index file so that even if file properties are going to be reset, the plugin would use the index when building graph.

Use case 2:
You would like to manually override creation dates for files in your Vault.
Solution: the index CSV file allows to protect dates from automated updates.
releases.name: 2.0.0 - Automatic file index

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description:
Resolution of #5: By default, the plugin uses file creation date defined by the system. As per issue #5, system information might not be reliable due to different reasons like file sync/copy when the file is considered recreated.

It is possible to configure a property to be used instead. The `Date property` setting accepts a frontmatter property name to be used to parse the date from.

Thanks to @Tainmere for raising the feature request.
releases.name: Creation date property support.

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description: Choose how the legend entries are organized based on the chart values.
releases.name: Legend sorting order.

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description: Fixed chart size (#4) and enabled mobile app support.
releases.name: Mobile app support

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description: This minor release includes a feature to allow more convenient configuration of folder lists (both positive and negative match).
releases.name: Support of :in: and :not_in: operands in folder list patterns.

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description: Fixed preset button in plugin settings.
releases.name: Minor bug fix.

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description:
This release brings configurable file categories based on file path and regular expressions. This feature allows to exclude certain folders as requested by some of the users.

It also fixes calculation issues observed previously.

Bug fixes:

- #3 - file count calculation

Features:

- #1 - ability to exclude folders
releases.name: v1.1.0 - Configurable file categories

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description:
### Features

- Added functionality for generating a CSV summary report in plugin settings.
releases.name: File summary report generation.

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description:
### Bug Fixes

- Fixed graph display in dark mode.

releases.author: wizentex
releases.name: Updates to comply with Obsidian guidelines.

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description: Minor code refactoring for community release of the plugin.
releases.name: Code fix for community release.

releases.author: wizentex
releases.description: Minimal working prototype of the plugin enables modal with the  graph of the number of files in the Vault.
releases.name: MVP Release.
